why: Plug pin solder should mate to receptacle socket variants, not to other plug variants or mounting hardware.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed mating references to slash sheets /2 and /4; /5 is mounting hardware, not a connector mate.

why: The 51-contact plug pin solder configuration should preserve the same mating family as the 9-contact variant.

source_evidence.note: Mating slash-sheet references are document-level for /01, so they apply across cavity counts.

why: Receptacle socket solder should mate to plug pin solder/crimp variants, not to receptacles or mounting hardware.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed mating references to slash sheets /1 and /3; /5 is mounting hardware only.

why: The 51-contact receptacle socket solder configuration should match the same plug families as other /02 variants.

source_evidence.note: Mating slash-sheet references are document-level for /02.

why: The 100-contact H insert arrangement remains a receptacle socket solder mate for /01 and /03 only.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed /02 mates with /1 and /3; 100-contact insert variants remain within the same mating family.

why: Plug pin crimp should mate to receptacle socket solder/crimp, not to other plugs or mounting hardware.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed mating references to slash sheets /2 and /4; /5 is a hardware reference only.

why: The 51-contact class M crimp plug should preserve the same valid mate sheets as the 9-contact variant.

source_evidence.note: Mating slash-sheet references are document-level for /03.

why: The 100-contact class M crimp plug should still only return the receptacle mate families.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed /03 mates with /2 and /4 only; /5 is not a connector mate.

why: Receptacle socket crimp should mate to plug pin solder/crimp, not to receptacles or hardware.

source_evidence.note: Audit confirmed mating references to slash sheets /1 and /3; /5 is mounting hardware only.

why: The 51-contact class M receptacle socket crimp configuration should preserve the same plug mate family.
